Short title and commencement.- (l) These rules may be called the Commercial Couns (Statistical Data) Rules,2018. (2) They shall come into forc€ on the date of their publication in the oflicial Gazette. 2. Delinitions.- (l ) ln these rules unless the context olherwise requires,- (a) "Act" means the Commercial Couns Act, 2015 (4 of 2016): (b) "Schedule" means the Schedule appended to these rules. (2) The words and cxpressions used and not detjned in these rules but defined in the Act- shall have the same meanings as respectively assigned to them in that Act. 3, Collection and disclosure of data by Commercial Courts, Comhercial Appellate Courts, Commercial Dlyisions end Commercial Appellate Divisions of Hlgh Courts.- The statistical data. as required by section l7 of the Act, regarding the number of suits, applications, appeals or writ petitions liled before the Commercial Courts, Commercial Appellate Cou(s, Commercial Division or Commercial Appellate Division, as the case may be, the pendency of such cases, (he status of each case, and the number of cases disposed off, shall be maintained. updaled and published by the tenth day of every month in the form specified in Schedule appended to these rules, by the concemed High Courc on their websile. qFTTiFI 6I iTFI !iE-n crc-,it ff {qr (_Ffi+ + vrrqEn) iI ifrrd crr+i ff ri@r (kiT 3 + +gcr rffa + +.r{) -crqmq t iiE{ 5acrcrii ft{r*r (kiq 3 + ir{qR {ffi + 3flfuft R-{) ffc-.rq rrq qrcrit + riqr(Riq 3 + srgen rfi+ * +{rn) qrcA 5r Aft{.{q 6d h ftrI Et foit + qt€-( {qr (1) (2) (3) (4) (5) (6) l7) IT {. -- 2 of 3 -- qrq -gE-g 3( i qT(I 6l lliIq:l : STgIqRq t7 SCHEDULE Format for Statistical data (See Rule 3) S.No (l) Name ot the Court t2l No. of ceses pending (on the lc day ol month of _) (3) inslitutcd (during the month as p€r column 3 ) (4) Totol csses pending in the court (oh lhe last day of the month as p€r column 3) (:, No. of cases disposed (dllring lhe month as p€r column 3) 16) days talen to decidc the caie (7) - lNo.A-6001 I (06)/20/201 6-Admin-III(LA)l Dr. Rajiv Mani, Jt.
